about.title: About me
about.p1: I'm Luis, **Full-stack developer** with experience in end-to-end web application development. On the frontend, I work with modern technologies to create clear, functional, and high-performing interfaces, always prioritizing the user experience.
about.p2: On the backend, I develop and maintain business logic, working with relational databases and complex multi-table structures, ensuring system consistency, efficiency, and scalability.
about.p3: I have an **intermediate level of English** and am characterized by responsibility, punctuality, and a results-oriented approach. I value teamwork, effective communication, and a commitment to quality in every project I undertake.

cta.text: If you're looking for a committed developer with a strong sense of responsibility and teamwork, feel free to reach out. I'm ready to bring my passion and skills to your next project.
